overview: Esper Midrange in Pioneer leverages efficient disruption and resilient threats to control the board while generating long-term value. By combining early interaction with mid-to-late game card advantage, the deck aims to outlast aggressive strategies and outvalue control decks. Success relies on precise sequencing of removal and disruption to protect key assets.
win_conditions: Disrupting key plays with Thoughtseize and Fatal Push
Generating card advantage with Quantum Riddler to outvalue decks

keep_criteria: Hands with early disruption like Thoughtseize or Fatal Push
Two-mana spells paired with a threat
Hands that can interact with aggressive starts
mulligan_criteria: Three-mana or higher spells without disruption
Hands with only lands or only threats

early_game: Play lands and use Fatal Push to remove early threats
Cast Thoughtseize to disrupt opponent's game plan
Hold up mana for interaction if possible
mid_game: Deploy Quantum Riddler to generate card advantage
Trade efficiently with removal and disruption
Stabilize against aggressive decks while building board presence
late_game: Use Quantum Riddler's ability to outvalue control decks
Deploy resilient threats to close out games
Maintain hand advantage to outlast attrition strategies

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Use to remove key combo pieces, early threats, or win conditions. Prioritize targeting cards that enable the opponent's strategy.

key_cards.name: Fatal Push
key_cards.notes: Cast on turn one to clear 1-toughness threats. Hold up for combat tricks or to protect your own creatures when necessary.

key_cards.name: Quantum Riddler
key_cards.notes: Deploy as a resilient threat. Use its ability to draw cards and gain tempo, especially in longer games against control or midrange decks.

sequencing_tips: Hold up Fatal Push mana to protect Quantum Riddler from early removal
Cast Thoughtseize before playing threats to ensure they stick
Use Quantum Riddler's ability on opponent's turn to maximize card advantage

matchups.advice: Prioritize Fatal Push on early threats and use Thoughtseize to delay their game plan. Play Quantum Riddler behind a blocker if possible.
Use Thoughtseize to remove key answers or win conditions. Deploy Quantum Riddler to outvalue their hand and generate pressure.
Target combo pieces with Thoughtseize immediately. Use Fatal Push to disrupt early setup creatures. Race with Quantum Riddler if disruption fails.
